title: param20h/PDF-Assistant-RAG
summary: PDF-Assistant-RAG是一个基于TypeScript的AI文档助手，支持用户上传复杂PDF文件，通过多阶段检索增强生成（RAG）管道与AI进行对话，提供准确引用的答案。该项目适用于处理财务报告、法律合同和研究论文等文档，具有生产就绪的架构和良好的性能。，基于模型推理的架构
description: PDF-Assistant-RAG is a complete, production-ready AI document assistant that lets users upload complex PDFs, financial reports, legal contracts, and research papers — then chat with an AI that provides accurate, cited answers powered by a multi-stage Retrieval-Augmented Generation pipeline.
